rationale: Acting on Review 2 keeps the intended AlgebraicGroup/FunctorOfPoints.lean placement (matching the roadmap and the actual content: the Group/CommGroup instances + mapValue for the R-points functor, with sections for Hopf/Bialgebra/CommHopf) and only makes one internal lemma private (real but minor namespace mismatch for antipode_convMul_id at line 64, used only at 129). Acting on Review 1 forces a needless split/relocation of all generic + functor-of-points code into Bialgebra/HopfAlgebra subdirs (contradicting the roadmap and diff) plus unrelated non-placement work.
